name: io.github.QoreNext-IT/QoreNextMCP
description: Company verification, hierarchy analysis, trade screening and sanctions compliance via MCP

environmentVariables.name: QORNEXT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your QornextMCP API key. Get one at https://qorenext-app.azurewebsites.net/signup

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Verify MCP server is operational and get version info. No authentication required.

tools.name: submit_entities
tools.description: Submit companies or organizations for verification and hierarchy analysis.

tools.name: submit_company_for_screening
tools.description: Submit a company for trade screening and compliance/sanctions checking.

tools.name: get_request_status
tools.description: Get status and results of a screening request. Returns PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETE or FAILED.
